feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S4 HANA BP field enhancement
entry.content: I have added a custom tab in the BP screen with custom fields using the BDT technique, and it is appearing. However, when I enter data in the custom fields and click the Save button, the data is not getting saved at both the BP screen level and the table level. I am getting a message saying, 'No changes were made.Please help me

entry.title: Error P301 No entry in table T528 for S 500XXXXX
entry.content:
I'm using the "HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA" function to create employee infotypes 0000, 0001, and 0002, but when I select the position I want to assign to the employee, I get the following error: "Error RP301 No entry exists in table T528B for S 50005802."

I checked the position in table T528 and if the record with its respective information is there, I validated the object's effective dates with the date I'm using in the employee registration, and they are the same: 01012025.
If I manually register the employee with that position, I don't get any errors.
Has anyone else experienced this error?

entry.title: Output Routine requirement for Sales schedule agreement
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a need to create an output triggered by updating the scheduling lines on a sales scheduling agreement. I have created the Output, what I can't find (if it exists) is a routine that can create the output once one or more scheduling lines are updated, in particular I need it to notify users of the Scheduling agreement update via Idoc DELFOR.

entry.title: help needed in downloading pdf from sharepoint and upload it in service of object
entry.content:
Hi All, I need to know how can we download a pdf from sharepoint and upload it in the service of object within hana.

Thank you all for the help!

entry.title: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content:
Can Joule be enabled for on-prem ADT ABAP project development for AI Coding Assistance? We are running the newest available version of on-premise S/4 HANA (2023 FSP02 instance). The AI Core set-up guide & Launchpad provisioning guide are a great start but I am missing how the on-premise system enables Joule after the cloud connector is established. 

SAP Note 3513374 mentions the possibility to integrate with SAP_BASIS 756 and up. However, after setting up AI Core and Launchpad - I cannot locate any documentation on how to complete the integration for on-prem systems. 

Our objective is to have Joule enabled from our ADT development environment. Joule is currently not recognized as enabled.

 

The Generative AI in ABAP Cloud Docs only mention validity for Public Cloud & BTP ABAP. Subsequent guides require establishing communication system and communication arrangement configuration, which I do not think that our on-prem system has the ability to configure.

What are the final steps to enable the Joule code assistant in an on-premise S/4 HANA system?

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Benefit Insurance- include previous year's earnings for Insurance coverage calcs.
entry.content:
I have a new requirement to change Short Term Disability Insurance from using BSAL for coverage amount to the total previous years earnings instead.  They are asking for the amount on the W2s, so they are looking at tech WT /301 to be used for coverage amount on the insurance.

Is this configuation possible and what would need to be done?

Thanks

Teresa

entry.title: HANA drivers for .NET
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm really confused about the HANA client drivers for .NET/ADO.NET as there are multiple versions, some available for some operating systems and for others not. In particular, I'd like to understand the difference between:

Sap.Data.Hana.Core.v2.1.dll

Sap.Data.Hana.Net.v6.0.dll

Sap.Data.Hana.Net.v8.0.dll

since they all seem to provide the same library and the same functions. Is one newer than the others or more appropriate for use with e.g. .NET 9? I have found no proper supporting information in the documentation.

Thank you

entry.title: Enhance Standard CDS view I_AugmentedPhysInvtryDocItem for Fiori- Physical Inventory Analysis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a requirement to add custom movement types to an existing fiori app - Physical Inventory Analysis that displays only 701 and 702 at the moment.

This App uses BEx query with data source I_PhysInvtryCube, this CDS view has another CDS view as data source I_AugmentedPhysInvtryDocItem.

Inside this CDS view, I found a CASE statement that restricts the movement types, now I want to change this CASE statement, can you help me how to achieve this.

I am looking at Custom Fields and Logic app to enhance this CDS view, but unable to find the business context. Is there a way to enhance the logic of this CDS view without creating a NEW CDS view.

Appreciate any help!

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GoodsMovementType'

cast((case when Quantity > BookQtyBfrCountInMatlBaseUnit and PhysicalInventoryItemIsCounted = 'X'

then _AdjmtPostingMovementType.PhysInvtryIncreasingQtyMvtType

else case when Quantity < BookQtyBfrCountInMatlBaseUnit and PhysicalInventoryItemIsCounted = 'X'

then _AdjmtPostingMovementType.PhysInvtryDecreasingQtyMvtType

else ''

end

end) as pi_bwart preserving type) as GoodsMovementType,

entry.title: Replacement functionality for "Incompletion procedures for missing Foreign Trade Data" in S/4HANA
entry.content: Tcodes VI29, VI49 and table EIUV are not available in S/4HANA since Foreign Trade functionality is deprecated. How to then set up "Incompletion procedures" for missing foreign trade data in S/4HANA? Is there any alternative config. or functionality? Also, any replacement for table EIUV to capture the logs?

entry.title: Factura de fletes en la MIRO me muestra este error Nº mensaje: M8_2081
entry.content: Al contabilizar la factura de fletes en la MIRO muestra mensaje de error: Doc.compras XXX procedente de SAP TM, selección imposible. Nº mensaje: M8_2081.

entry.title: Issue when performing reversal via Fiori Apps Supplier Invoices List
entry.content: I have posted invoice with reference INV 123, I am able to perform reversal in MR8M. However, if similar scenario invoice is posted with different reference, I am not able to perform reversal via Fiori Apps Supplier Invoices List. The error Check whether document has already been entered under number XX & & will pop up. The error message is referred exactly to the invoice number that I am going to perform reversal. Does that mean for all Invoice that have Reference info should only reverse via MR8M and not via Fiori Apps?

entry.title: How To Execute Query through API
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to Execute Query (Saved query) through API in SAP B1 service layer 

Please guide -how to process?

entry.title: Namespaces are not supported for this language version (failed BAS -> on-premise deployment)
entry.content:
We are unable to deploy UI apps within our partner namespace from Business Application Studio to on-premise S/4 HANA 2023 (FPS02) instance (ie. packages set to ABAP for Cloud Development). The resulting BAS deployment error is: "Namespaces are not supported for this language version".

 

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: cust.packandship
type: application
builder:
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**
  customTasks:
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        log: 5
        target:
          destination: ABC
          url: https://systemurl.local:443
          scp: false
        app:
          name: /CUST/UI_PACKSHIP
          package: /CUST/_UI_PACKSHIP
          transport: ABCK900xxxx
        exclude:
          - /test/

 

I have found that the deployment runs successfully if I direct the deployment to a tier 2 package set the Standard ABAP. Why are we limited to deploying partner namesapce UI components into Standard ABAP Tier 2 packages? This is counter productive towards the SAP's movement shift partner development towards Clean Core best practices.    

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

entry.title: Freight settlement SAP TM
entry.content:
In the freight settlement (Transportation costs), when I post it, it automatically generates the order, but it is placing the tax indicator C1 – 15% and I want the correct one to be one that it thinks is C5. Is there a way to configure it?

#SAPTM

entry.title: clarifications about HANA MONOTORING in single AND MDC modes in regards to CPU
entry.content:
clarifications about HANA MONOTORING in single AND MDC modes in regards to CPU

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Browser Cache Logon Issue
entry.content: Our quality instance has 3 clients.  When a user is in one QS instance client called 100 and logs out and then opens another URL in the same QS instance but different client called 200 the system logs them in like they are in the second URL client but they are still actually in the first client.  If we clear the browser cache it corrects this issue.  We are using Azure SSO to authenticate.  We temporarily created a script for the user to run that clears their browser cache and then opens the URL but this is not a long term solution.  Has anyone run across this and how have you resolved it?

entry.title: BW Bridge: In what schema can I find table TFACS?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to use the WORKDAYS_BETWEEN function an AMDP transformation routine in BW Bridge. I get an error that the TFACS table cannot be found in the schema when I try to load some data. I found the TFACS table in BW Bridge using the search, but there is no schema mentioned there. Also, when I try to preview the data of TFACS, I get an error that I'm not authorized to do so. I used the Datasphere Database Explorer as an alternative to test my SQL, but I get the same error. Any idea of how I can find the schema and resolve this issue?

entry.title: dynamic selection disabled in VA05
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
VA05 > EDIT > DYNAMIC SELECTIONS 

The Dynamic selection option in VA05 is grayed. My account has the parameter "SD_VARIANT_MAINTAIN" and tried to change it to X/A/U but unfortunately it won't turn on the Dynamic Selection button.

Is there any option to fix this?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: MRP-Type(Dismm) Field usage issue in Structure
entry.content:
Hello All

In custom structure where i have a field DISMM(MRP-type) which is causing an ATC P1 issue 
Short text : SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item SI_PP14: Logistics_PP-MRP - Forecast Based Plann
Note : 3211383
I have used this structure in my report and due to usage of it , i am getting an ATC issue in structure
I want to know how i can deal with this issue, i need a field DISMM in report which has been fetched from marc and displaying to user through ALV i can't remove the field i need it and i am unable to find a solution or else pragmas.
So can anyone who has worked on S4 Hana Migration help me out 

Thanks in Advance

#ABAP #S4 Hana #MRP Type #ATC #CCA  #SAP Technical  #MRP #dismm

entry.title: SD: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse XXX Message No.: V1392
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm entering an order in TRX VA01, but when I place the material, it shows an error: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse P010. Message number: V1392. I'm seeing the error because I have the material stored in warehouse P011, and I need to send it to that warehouse.

Is there some extra configuration where it's taking warehouse P010 instead of P011?

Thank you for your help.
